g.text: Multi-Tenancy Patterns — same three tenants, three ways to share
Visual overlap encodes how much is shared. Cost per tenant flips from highest (Silo) to lowest (Pool).
Stacks per tenant: shared compute + 1 DB
Blast radius: data isolated, compute shared
rows of all tenants mixed; isolated by WHERE tenant_id = ?
Stacks per tenant: shared (1 for all)
Anchor: 1,000× cost spread end-to-end. Pick the pattern per customer tier, not per company.
